case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. DIANE DORRANS SAEKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAEKS, DIANE DORRANS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-25-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
